---
title: "Joanito post analysis"
author: "David López"
date: "2025-11-19"
output: html_document
---

```{r packages, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
packages <- c(
  "Seurat", "SeuratObject", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "DoubletFinder",
  "harmony", "celldex", "SingleR", "BiocParallel", "tidyverse", "magrittr",
  "data.table", "gridExtra", "gdata", "RColorBrewer", "SingleCellExperiment",
  "pheatmap", "ComplexHeatmap", "EnhancedVolcano", "scGate", "S4Vectors",
  "corrplot", "ggthemes", "cowplot", "scRNAseq", "scuttle", "SummarizedExperiment",
  "scran", "scater", "clustree", "openxlsx", "tidyplots", "convert2anndata",
  "dittoSeq", "clusterProfiler", "enrichplot", "ggmin", "org.Hs.eg.db",
  "scMetabolism", "rsvd", "viridis", "patchwork", "presto", "UCell", "Matrix",
  "remotes", "RCAv2", "DUBStepR", "DESeq2", "fgsea", "apeglm", "pathview",
  "future", "progressr", "readxl", "proxy", "ashr", "SeuratDisk", "GEOquery",
  "kBET", "rcartocolor", "AUCell", "randomcoloR", "presto", "scDblFinder",
  "ggpointdensity", "purrr", "scales", "MAST"
)

# Cargar todas
lapply(packages, require, character.only = TRUE)

my_colors <- c("#1E938B", "#FFA844", "#67BB6B", "#E03B3B", "#C580CC", "#8A4CD6", 
              "#A8A6E2", "#AB307D", "#E96767", "#1D6FAD", "#ACAC26", "#8B7E77", "#82C5B2")

my_colors2 <- c("#1E938B", "#E03B3B", "#67BB6B", "#C580CC", "#FFA844", "#8A4CD6", 
              "#A8A6E2", "#AB307D", "#8B7E77", "#E96767",  "#1D6FAD")
```

# Load data

```{r Load data}
# Load data
srat <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/combObj_newData_final_doubletRemoved_clustered_373058_AddBoMetadata_369059finalcell_050824.rds")
```

## Rename clusters

```{r Rename MCT}
srat <- FindNeighbors(srat, dims=1:15)
srat <- FindClusters(srat, res=0.5)

srat$David_MCT <- dplyr::case_when(
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(2, 12, 17, 21) ~ "PlasmaB",
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(4, 20, 22) ~ "B",
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(7, 11, 13, 18) ~ "Epithelial",
  srat$seurat_clusters == 24 ~ "Mast",
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(9, 14, 15, 16, 26) ~ "Fibroblast",
  srat$seurat_clusters == 10 ~ "Endothelial",
  srat$seurat_clusters == 23 ~ "Entericglial",
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(3, 8) ~ "Myeloid",
  srat$seurat_clusters == 25 ~ "Neutrophil",
  srat$seurat_clusters == 28 ~ "pDC",
  srat$seurat_clusters %in% c(0, 1, 5, 6, 19, 27) ~ "TNKILC",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

umap_plot <- DimPlot(srat, group.by = "David_MCT", label = TRUE, raster = FALSE, cols = my_colors2, pt.size = 0.01)
ggsave("joanito_MCT.png", plot = umap_plot, width = 10, height = 9)
```

## Subsetting

```{r}
tnk_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = David_MCT == "TNKILC")
srat_tnk  <- subset(srat, cells = tnk_cells)

myeloid_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = David_MCT %in% c("Myeloid", "pDC", "Neutrophil"))
srat_myeloid  <- subset(srat, cells = myeloid_cells)

stromal_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = David_MCT %in% c("Fibroblast", "Endothelial"))
srat_stromal  <- subset(srat, cells = stromal_cells)

epi_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = MCT == "Epithelial")
srat_epi  <- subset(srat, cells = epi_cells)

saveRDS(srat_tnk, "joanito_tnk_251119.rds")
saveRDS(srat_myeloid, "joanito_myeloid_251119.rds")
saveRDS(srat_stromal, "joanito_stromal_251119.rds")
saveRDS(srat_epi, "joanito_epithelial_251119.rds")

######### REST OF THE CELLS #########
other_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = David_MCT %in% c("B", "PlasmaB", "Entericglial", "Mast"))
srat_other  <- subset(srat, cells = other_cells)
other_meta <- srat_other@meta.data
other_meta$cell.id <- rownames(other_meta)
other_meta <- other_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT)
write.csv(other_meta, "rest_cell_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")
saveRDS(srat_other, "joanito_rest_cells_251120.rds")
```

# Myeloid

```{r Myeloid - Analysis}
srat_myeloid <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_myeloid_251119.rds")

VariableFeatures(srat_myeloid) <- split(row.names(srat_myeloid@meta.data), srat_myeloid@meta.data$dataset) |> lapply(function(cells_use) {
  srat_myeloid[,cells_use] |>
    FindVariableFeatures(selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000) |> 
    VariableFeatures()
}) |> unlist |> unique

srat_myeloid <- srat_myeloid |> 
  ScaleData(verbose = FALSE) |> 
  RunPCA(features = VariableFeatures(srat_myeloid), npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)

srat_myeloid <- RunHarmony(srat_myeloid, "dataset")
srat_myeloid <- FindNeighbors(srat_myeloid, dims=1:20, reduction="harmony") #default: dims=15
srat_myeloid <- RunUMAP(srat_myeloid, dims= 1:20, reduction="harmony")
srat_myeloid <- FindClusters(srat_myeloid, res=0.5)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_myeloid,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters)))) 
ggsave("myeloid_seurat_clusters_dim20.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_myeloid,  group.by = "dataset", label = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("myeloid_datasets_dim20.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

#saveRDS(srat_myeloid, "joanito_myeloid_251119.rds")

# Myeloid markers_immune 
p <- FeaturePlot(srat_myeloid, features = c("CD14", "CD68", "S100A8", "PLAUR", "TREM2", "C1QC", "SPP1", "CXCL9", "GPNMB", "MARCO", "CD163", "LYVE1", "IL6", "IL1A", "CXCL3"),max.cutoff = "q98", ncol=5) & scale_color_viridis(option = "D") 
ggsave(filename = "myeloid_markers_new_dim20_251125.png", plot = p, width = 15, height = 22, dpi = 300)

##### 1st Annotation
srat_myeloid$David_CT1 <- dplyr::case_when(
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(0, 8) ~ "Macro TREM2+_C1QC+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(2, 4, 7) ~ "Monocyte",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(5, 10, 12) ~ "cDC",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 1 ~ "Macro SPP1+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 3 ~ "Macro LYVE1+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 8 ~ "Neutrophil",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 9 ~ "Cycling Myeloid",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 11 ~ "pDC",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 13 ~ "Contaminant",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

#saveRDS(srat_myeloid, "joanito_myeloid_251119.rds")

myeloid_cells <- WhichCells(srat_myeloid, expression = David_CT1 != "Contaminant")
srat_myeloid_clean  <- subset(srat_myeloid, cells = myeloid_cells)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_myeloid_clean,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = my_colors2, label.size = 4)
ggsave("myeloid_datasets_David_CT1.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(srat_myeloid_clean, "joanito_myeloid_251119_David_annotated.rds")

##### Extract labels
myeloid_meta <- srat_myeloid@meta.data
myeloid_meta$cell.id <- rownames(myeloid_meta)
myeloid_meta <- myeloid_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT, David_CT1)
write.csv(myeloid_meta, "myeloid_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")

#########
umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_myeloid,  group.by = "Bo_SC_cluster", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_myeloid$Bo_SC_cluster))), label.size = 4) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("myeloid_Bo_Grace_annotation.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r Myeloid - Find Markers}
# Finding de genes/immune markers 
markers_immune <- FindAllMarkers(srat_myeloid,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_immune, "markers_myeloid_new_dim20_(just in case).csv")

top_markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(-avg_log2FC) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

srat_myeloid <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat_myeloid,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_immune$gene),
  dims = NULL,
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE,
  reorder.numeric = FALSE
)

top_markers_immune$cluster <- factor(top_markers_immune$cluster, levels = levels(Idents(srat_myeloid)))
top_markers_immune <- top_markers_immune[order(top_markers_immune$cluster),]

srat_myeloid <- ScaleData(srat_myeloid, features=top_markers_immune$gene, split.by= "dataset")

# Downsample equally by patient_id and create the heatmap plot
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters)))
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(subset(srat_myeloid, downsample = 400), features = top_markers_immune$gene, group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

ggsave("myeloid_markers_heatmap_new_dim20.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 50, height = 60, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

###### Post 1st annotation
# Finding de genes/immune markers 
markers_immune <- FindAllMarkers(srat_myeloid,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 group.by = "David_CT1",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_immune, "markers_myeloid_new_dim20_CT1.csv")
```

```{r 2nd annotation}
##### 2nd Annotation
srat_myeloid$David_CT1 <- dplyr::case_when(
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(0, 8) ~ "Macro TREM2+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(1, 5) ~ "Monocyte",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters %in% c(4, 10, 12) ~ "cDC",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 2 ~ "Macro C1QC+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 6 ~ "Macro SPP1+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 3 ~ "Macro LYVE1+",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 7 ~ "Neutrophil",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 9 ~ "Cycling Myeloid",
  srat_myeloid$seurat_clusters == 11 ~ "pDC",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_myeloid,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = my_colors, label.size = 4)
ggsave("myeloid_datasets_David_CT1_correct.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(srat_myeloid, "joanito_myeloid_251121_David_annotated_correct.rds")

##### Extract labels
myeloid_meta <- srat_myeloid@meta.data
myeloid_meta$cell.id <- rownames(myeloid_meta)
myeloid_meta <- myeloid_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT, David_CT1)
write.csv(myeloid_meta, "myeloid_full_annotation_to_merge_correct.csv")
```

```{r Part 2 - Post Merve indications}
srat <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_myeloid_251121_David_annotated_correct.rds")

srat <- FindNeighbors(srat, dims=1:25, reduction="harmony")
srat <- RunUMAP(srat, dims= 1:25, reduction="harmony")
srat <- FindClusters(srat, res=0.5)
DimPlot(srat,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$seurat_clusters))))
DimPlot(srat,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$seurat_clusters))))

pseudo_myeloid <- AggregateExpression(srat, assays = "RNA", slot = "counts",return.seurat = TRUE, group.by = c("seurat_clusters", "sample.ID", "dataset"))
pb_meta <- pseudo_myeloid@meta.data
markers_lr <- FindAllMarkers(
  object = srat,
  assay = "RNA",
  slot = "data",
  min.pct = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  only.pos = TRUE
)

markers_lr <- markers_lr |>
    dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_lr, "test_markers_myeloid.csv")
#########
markers_immune <- read.csv("myeloid_annotated_FindAllMarkers_LR_filtered.csv")

top_markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

top_markers_immune$cluster <- factor(
  top_markers_immune$cluster,
  levels = levels(srat$David_CT1)
)
top_markers_immune <- top_markers_immune[order(top_markers_immune$cluster),]

# Build cluster tree based on David_CT1 order
srat <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_immune$gene),
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE
)

# Scale split by dataset
srat <- ScaleData(srat, features = top_markers_immune$gene, split.by = "dataset")

# Heatmap colors
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$David_CT1)))





srat <- ScaleData(srat, features=top_markers_immune$gene, split.by= "dataset")

# Downsample equally by patient_id and create the heatmap plot
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$David_CT1)))
meta <- srat@meta.data
meta$cell.id <- rownames(meta)
cells_use <- meta |>
  group_by(David_CT1) |>
  sample_n(size = min(100, n()), replace = FALSE) |>
  pull(cell.id)

# Subset the Seurat object to only those cells
srat_ds <- subset(srat, cells = cells_use)

# Heatmap
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(
  srat_ds, features = top_markers_immune$gene, group.by = "David_CT1", group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

ggsave("new_myeloid_markers_heatmap_251125.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 30, height = 40, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
```

```{r Part 2 - Post Merve indications}
pb_meta2 <- pb_meta

clusters <- unique(pb_meta2$cluster)

for (cl in clusters) {
  
  colname <- paste0("group_", cl)
  
  pb_meta2[[colname]] <- ifelse(pb_meta2$cluster == cl, cl, "Other")
}


pb_counts <- pseudo_myeloid@assays$RNA$counts
results_list <- list()

for (cl in clusters) {

  message("Running DESeq2 on cluster: ", cl)
  
  group_col <- paste0("group_", cl)
  
  # DESeq2 object
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(
    countData = pb_counts,
    colData   = pb_meta2,
    design    = as.formula(paste("~ dataset +", group_col))
  )
  
  dds <- DESeq(dds)
  
  # Extract contrast
  res <- results(dds, contrast = c(group_col, cl, "Other"))
  
  results_list[[cl]] <- as.data.frame(res)
}
```

# TNKILC

```{r TNKILC - Analysis}
srat_tnk <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_tnk_251119.rds")

VariableFeatures(srat_tnk) <- split(row.names(srat_tnk@meta.data), srat_tnk@meta.data$dataset) |> lapply(function(cells_use) {
  srat_tnk[,cells_use] |>
    FindVariableFeatures(selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000) |> 
    VariableFeatures()
}) |> unlist |> unique

srat_tnk <- srat_tnk |> 
  ScaleData(verbose = FALSE) |> 
  RunPCA(features = VariableFeatures(srat_tnk), npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)

srat_tnk <- RunHarmony(srat_tnk, "dataset")
srat_tnk <- FindNeighbors(srat_tnk, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony") #deafult: dim=20, res=0.5
srat_tnk <- RunUMAP(srat_tnk, dims= 1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_tnk <- FindClusters(srat_tnk, res=0.9)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_tnk,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_tnk$seurat_clusters))))
ggsave("tnk_seurat_clusters_dim30_res09.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_tnk,  group.by = "dataset", cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("tnk_datasets_dim30.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(srat_tnk_clean, "joanito_tnk_251125_David_annotated.rds")

# tnk markers_immune 
p <- FeaturePlot(srat_tnk, features = c("CD247", "TRAC", "TRGC1", "IL7R", "CD3E", "LEF1", "CCR7", "PTPRC", "GZMB", "PRF1", "IFNG", "PDCD1", "HAVCR2", "LAG3", "MAF", "CXCR5", "FOXP3", "FCER1G", "TYROBP", "GATA3", "TRDC", "NCAM1", "CD4", "CD8A", "FOXP3", "GZMB", "PRF1", "PCNA", "IL7R"),max.cutoff = "q98", ncol=5) & scale_color_viridis(option = "D") 
ggsave(filename = "tnk_markers_new_dim30.png", plot = p, width = 20, height = 20, dpi = 300)

########

tnk_cells <- WhichCells(srat_tnk, expression = seurat_clusters %in% c(0:16))
srat_tnk_clean  <- subset(srat_tnk, cells = tnk_cells)

srat_tnk_clean <- FindNeighbors(srat_tnk_clean, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony") #deafult: dim=20, res=0.5
srat_tnk_clean <- RunUMAP(srat_tnk_clean, dims= 1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_tnk_clean <- FindClusters(srat_tnk_clean, res=0.6)

##### 1st Annotation
srat_tnk$David_CT1 <- dplyr::case_when(
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(0, 8) ~ "CD4 central memory-like",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(1, 5) ~ "CD8 effector/memory",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(2, 3) ~ "Treg",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters == 4 ~ "CD4 T-helper",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(6, 18, 22) ~ "CD4 naive",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(9, 16) ~ "CD8 effector/exhausted",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters == 10 ~ "CD4 Th17",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters == 11 ~ "CD4 Tfh-like",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(7, 12, 17) ~ "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters == 13 ~ "MAIT",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(14, 15, 21) ~ "NK-ILC",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters == 19 ~ "Cycling TNKILC",
  srat_tnk$seurat_clusters %in% c(20, 23, 24, 25, 26) ~ "Contaminant",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

tnk_cells <- WhichCells(srat_tnk, expression = David_CT1 != "Contaminant")
srat_tnk_clean  <- subset(srat_tnk, cells = tnk_cells)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_tnk_clean,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, pt.size = 0.01, cols = my_colors)
umap_clusters
ggsave("tnk_David_CT1_251125.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(srat_tnk_clean, "joanito_tnk_251120_David_annotated.rds")
distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_tnk$David_CT1)))
##### Extract labels
tnk_meta <- srat_tnk@meta.data
tnk_meta$cell.id <- rownames(tnk_meta)
tnk_meta <- tnk_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT, David_CT1)
write.csv(tnk_meta, "tnk_full_annotation_to_merge_correct_261125.csv")

#########
srat_tnk <- readRDS("joanito_tnk_251120_David_annotated.rds")
umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_tnk,  group.by = "Bo_SC_cluster", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_tnk$Bo_SC_cluster))), label.size = 4) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("tnk_Bo_Grace_annotation.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r TNKILC - Find Markers}
# Finding de genes/immune markers 
markers_immune <- FindAllMarkers(srat_tnk,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_immune, "markers_tnk_new_dim30_res09.csv")

top_markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(-avg_log2FC) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

srat_tnk <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat_tnk,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_immune$gene),
  dims = NULL,
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE,
  reorder.numeric = FALSE
)

top_markers_immune$cluster <- factor(top_markers_immune$cluster, levels = levels(Idents(srat_tnk)))
top_markers_immune <- top_markers_immune[order(top_markers_immune$cluster),]

srat_tnk <- ScaleData(srat_tnk, features=top_markers_immune$gene, split.by= "dataset")

# Downsample equally by patient_id and create the heatmap plot
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_tnk$seurat_clusters)))
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(subset(srat_tnk, downsample = 400), features = top_markers_immune$gene, group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

ggsave("tnk_markers_heatmap_new_dim30.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 50, height = 60, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
saveRDS(srat_tnk, "joanito_tnk_251119.rds")
###### Post 1st annotation
# Finding de genes/immune markers 
markers_immune <- FindAllMarkers(srat_tnk,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 group.by = "David_CT1",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_immune, "markers_tnk_new_dim20_CT1.csv")
```

```{r Part 2 - Post Merve indications}
srat <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_tnk_251120_David_annotated.rds")

srat <- FindNeighbors(srat, dims=1:25, reduction="harmony")
srat <- RunUMAP(srat, dims= 1:25, reduction="harmony")
srat <- FindClusters(srat, res=0.5)
DimPlot(srat,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$seurat_clusters))))
DimPlot(srat,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$seurat_clusters))))

pseudo_myeloid <- AggregateExpression(srat, assays = "RNA", slot = "counts",return.seurat = TRUE, group.by = c("seurat_clusters", "sample.ID", "dataset"))
pb_meta <- pseudo_myeloid@meta.data
markers_lr <- FindAllMarkers(
  object = srat,
  assay = "RNA",
  slot = "data",
  min.pct = 0.25,
  logfc.threshold = 0.25,
  only.pos = TRUE
)

markers_lr <- markers_lr |>
    dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_lr, "test_markers_myeloid.csv")
#########
markers_immune <- read.csv("tnk_annotation_new_FindAllMarkers_LR_filtered.csv")

top_markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

top_markers_immune$cluster <- factor(
  top_markers_immune$cluster,
  levels = levels(srat$David_CT1)
)
top_markers_immune <- top_markers_immune[order(top_markers_immune$cluster),]

# Build cluster tree based on David_CT1 order
srat <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat_tnk_clean,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_immune$gene),
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE
)

# Scale split by dataset
srat <- ScaleData(srat, features = top_markers_immune$gene, split.by = "dataset")

# Heatmap colors
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$David_CT1)))

meta <- srat@meta.data
meta$cell.id <- rownames(meta)
cells_use <- meta |>
  group_by(David_CT1) |>
  sample_n(size = min(500, n()), replace = FALSE) |>
  pull(cell.id)

# Subset the Seurat object to only those cells
srat_ds <- subset(srat, cells = cells_use)

# Heatmap
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(
  srat_ds, features = top_markers_immune$gene, group.by = "David_CT1", group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

ggsave("new_tnk_markers_heatmap_251125.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 30, height = 40, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
```

# Stromal

```{r Stromal - Analysis}
srat_stromal <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_stromal_251119.rds")

VariableFeatures(srat_stromal) <- split(row.names(srat_stromal@meta.data), srat_stromal@meta.data$dataset) |> lapply(function(cells_use) {
  srat_stromal[,cells_use] |>
    FindVariableFeatures(selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000) |> 
    VariableFeatures()
}) |> unlist |> unique

srat_stromal <- srat_stromal |> 
  ScaleData(verbose = FALSE) |> 
  RunPCA(features = VariableFeatures(srat_stromal), npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)

srat_stromal <- RunHarmony(srat_stromal, "dataset")
srat_stromal <- FindNeighbors(srat_stromal, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_stromal <- RunUMAP(srat_stromal, dims= 1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_stromal <- FindClusters(srat_stromal, res=0.25)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_stromal,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_stromal$seurat_clusters))))
ggsave("stromal_seurat_clusters_dim30_res025.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_stromal,  group.by = "dataset", label = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("stromal_datasets_dim30.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

#saveRDS(srat_stromal, "joanito_stromal_251119.rds")

# stromal markers_immune 
p <- FeaturePlot(srat_stromal, features = c("COL1A1",  "PDGFRA", "PECAM1", "CDH5", "RGS5", "ACTA2", "CCL2", "CCL11", "HLA-DRA", "DCN", "SOX6", "VWF", "CAV1", "PROX1", "S100B", "SOX10"), ncol=4) & scale_color_viridis(option = "D") 
ggsave(filename = "stromal_markers.png", plot = p, width = 17, height = 18, dpi = 300)

########

stromal_cells <- WhichCells(srat_stromal, expression = seurat_clusters %in% c(0:16))
srat_stromal_clean  <- subset(srat_stromal, cells = stromal_cells)

srat_stromal_clean <- FindNeighbors(srat_stromal_clean, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony") #deafult: dim=20, res=0.5
srat_stromal_clean <- RunUMAP(srat_stromal_clean, dims= 1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_stromal_clean <- FindClusters(srat_stromal_clean, res=0.6)

##### 1st Annotation
srat_stromal$David_CT1 <- dplyr::case_when(
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 0 ~ "myCAF",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 1 ~ "Venous Endothelial cell",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 2 ~ "Fibro ADAMDEC1",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 3 ~ "Fibro stem cell niche",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 5 ~ "Fibro KCNN3",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 6 ~ "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters %in% c(4, 7) ~ "Pericyte",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 8 ~ "CXCL14+ CAF",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 9 ~ "Fibro BMP-producing ",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 11 ~ "Smooth Muscle",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 12 ~ "Lymphatic Endothelial cell",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 13 ~ "Myofibroblast",
  srat_stromal$seurat_clusters == 10 ~ "Contaminant",
  TRUE ~ "Other"
)

stromal_cells <- WhichCells(srat_stromal, expression = David_CT1 != "Contaminant")
srat_stromal_clean  <- subset(srat_stromal, cells = stromal_cells)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_stromal_clean,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, pt.size = 0.01, cols = my_colors)
umap_clusters
ggsave("stromal_David_CT1.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 11, height = 8, dpi = 300)

srat_stromal_clean <- FindNeighbors(srat_stromal_clean, dims=1:30, reduction="harmony")
srat_stromal_clean <- RunUMAP(srat_stromal_clean, dims= 1:30, reduction="harmony")
umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_stromal_clean,  group.by = "David_CT1", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, pt.size = 0.01, cols = my_colors)
ggsave("stromal_David_CT1_clean.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)

saveRDS(srat_stromal_clean, "joanito_stromal_251120_David_annotated.rds")

##### Extract labels
stromal_meta <- srat_stromal@meta.data
stromal_meta$cell.id <- rownames(stromal_meta)
stromal_meta <- stromal_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT, David_CT1)
write.csv(stromal_meta, "stromal_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")

#########
srat_stromal <- readRDS("joanito_stromal_251120_David_annotated.rds")
umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_stromal,  group.by = "Bo_SC_cluster", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_stromal$Bo_SC_cluster))), label.size = 4) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("stromal_Bo_Grace_annotation.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

```{r Stromal - Find Markers}
# Finding de genes/immune markers 
markers_stromal <- FindAllMarkers(srat_stromal,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_stromal <- markers_stromal |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_stromal, "markers_stromal_new_dim30_res025.csv")

top_markers_stromal <- markers_stromal |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(-avg_log2FC) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

srat_stromal <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat_stromal,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_stromal$gene),
  dims = NULL,
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE,
  reorder.numeric = FALSE
)

top_markers_stromal$cluster <- factor(top_markers_stromal$cluster, levels = levels(Idents(srat_stromal)))
top_markers_stromal <- top_markers_stromal[order(top_markers_stromal$cluster),]

srat_stromal <- ScaleData(srat_stromal, features=top_markers_stromal$gene, split.by= "dataset")

# Downsample equally by patient_id and create the heatmap plot
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_stromal$seurat_clusters)))
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(subset(srat_stromal, downsample = 400), features = top_markers_stromal$gene, group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

# Save the plot using ggsave with high resolution and proper dimensions
ggsave("stromal_markers_heatmap_new_dim30.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 50, height = 60, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
saveRDS(srat_stromal, "joanito_stromal_251119.rds")
###### Post 1st annotation
# Finding de genes/stromal markers 
markers_stromal <- FindAllMarkers(srat_stromal,
                                 only.pos = TRUE,
                                 test.use = "wilcox",
                                 group.by = "David_CT1",
                                 min.pct = 0.25,
                                 logfc.threshold = 0.25)

markers_stromal <- markers_stromal |>
  filter(p_val_adj < 0.05, avg_log2FC > 1)

write.csv(markers_stromal, "markers_stromal_new_dim20_CT1.csv")
```

```{r}
srat_stromal <- readRDS("joanito_stromal_251120_David_annotated.rds")
DimPlot(srat_stromal,  group.by = "seurat_clusters", label = TRUE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_stromal$seurat_clusters))))

p <- FeaturePlot(srat_stromal, features = c("COL1A1",  "PDGFRA", "PECAM1", "CDH5", "RGS5", "ACTA2", "CCL2", "CCL11", "HLA-DRA", "DCN", "SOX6", "VWF", "CAV1", "PROX1", "MYH11", "CXCL14", "FAP", "KCNN3", "ADAMDEC1", "POSTN"), ncol=5) & scale_color_viridis(option = "D") 
ggsave(filename = "stromal_markers_new_251125.png", plot = p, width = 21, height = 18, dpi = 300)

#########
markers_immune <- read.csv("stromal_annotated_FindAllMarkers_LR_filtered.csv")

top_markers_immune <- markers_immune |>
  group_by(cluster) |>
  arrange(desc(avg_log2FC)) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  ungroup()

top_markers_immune$cluster <- factor(
  top_markers_immune$cluster,
  levels = levels(srat$David_CT1)
)
top_markers_immune <- top_markers_immune[order(top_markers_immune$cluster),]

# Build cluster tree based on David_CT1 order
srat <- BuildClusterTree(
  srat_stromal,
  assay = "RNA",
  features = unique(top_markers_immune$gene),
  slot = "data",
  reorder = TRUE
)

# Scale split by dataset
srat <- ScaleData(srat, features = top_markers_immune$gene, split.by = "dataset")

# Heatmap colors
cols_lambda0 <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$David_CT1)))

meta <- srat@meta.data
meta$cell.id <- rownames(meta)
cells_use <- meta |>
  group_by(David_CT1) |>
  sample_n(size = min(500, n()), replace = FALSE) |>
  pull(cell.id)

# Subset the Seurat object to only those cells
srat_ds <- subset(srat, cells = cells_use)

# Heatmap
p_heatmap <- DoHeatmap(
  srat_ds, features = top_markers_immune$gene, group.by = "David_CT1", group.colors = cols_lambda0) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(
    low = "blue",
    mid = "white",
    high = "red",
    midpoint = 0,
    limit = c(-2, 2),
    name = "Expression",
    oob = scales::squish
  )

ggsave("new_stromal_markers_heatmap_251125.png", plot = p_heatmap, width = 30, height = 40, units = "cm", dpi = 300)
```

# Epithelial

```{r Epithelial - Analysis}
srat_epi <- readRDS("C:/Users/David Lopez/OneDrive - Universitat de Barcelona/PhD/4o Bloque/scRNA-Seq/Joanito et al/joanito_epithelial_251119.rds")

VariableFeatures(srat_epi) <- split(row.names(srat_epi@meta.data), srat_epi@meta.data$dataset) |> lapply(function(cells_use) {
  srat_epi[,cells_use] |>
    FindVariableFeatures(selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000) |> 
    VariableFeatures()
}) |> unlist |> unique

srat_epi <- srat_epi |> 
  ScaleData(verbose = FALSE) |> 
  RunPCA(features = VariableFeatures(srat_epi), npcs = 50, verbose = FALSE)

srat_epi <- RunHarmony(srat_epi, "dataset")
srat_epi <- FindNeighbors(srat_epi, dims=1:10, reduction="harmony")
srat_epi <- RunUMAP(srat_epi, dims= 1:10, reduction="harmony")
srat_epi <- FindClusters(srat_epi, res=0.1)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_epi,  group.by = "dataset", label = FALSE, cols = my_colors2) 
ggsave("epi_datasets.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_epi,  group.by = "Bo_patient_msi", label = FALSE, cols = my_colors2) 
ggsave("epi_msi.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_epi,  group.by = "patient.ID", label = FALSE, cols = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_epi$patient.ID)))) + NoLegend()
ggsave("epi_patients.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 9, height = 7, dpi = 300)

#saveRDS(srat_epi, "joanito_epi_251119.rds")

# epi markers_immune 
p <- FeaturePlot(srat_epi, features = c("EPCAM", "KRT20", "KRT8", "CEACAM5", "TFF3", "LGR5", "OLFM4", "ACL2", "MKI67", "VIM", "ZEB1", "TWIST", "MMP7", "MUC2", "SPDEF", "CHGA"), ncol=4) & scale_color_viridis(option = "D") 
ggsave(filename = "epithelial_markers.png", plot = p, width = 17, height = 18, dpi = 300)

###
epi_meta <- srat_epi@meta.data
epi_meta$cell.id <- rownames(epi_meta)
epi_meta <- epi_meta |>
  dplyr::select(cell.id, David_MCT)
write.csv(epi_meta, "epi_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")


saveRDS(srat_epi, "joanito_epithelial_251119.rds")
```

# Full Object Annotate

```{r Annotation}
myeloid_meta <- read.csv("myeloid_full_annotation_to_merge_correct.csv")
tnkilc_meta <- read.csv("tnk_full_annotation_to_merge_correct_261125.csv")
stromal_meta <- read.csv("stromal_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")
epi_meta <- read.csv("epi_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")
epi_meta$David_CT1 <- epi_meta$David_MCT
other_meta <- read.csv("rest_cell_full_annotation_to_merge.csv")
other_meta$David_CT1 <- other_meta$David_MCT

full_meta <- bind_rows(myeloid_meta, tnkilc_meta, stromal_meta, epi_meta, other_meta)
full_meta$X <- NULL
full_meta$David_MCT <- NULL

srat@meta.data$cell.id <- rownames(srat@meta.data)
idx <- match(rownames(srat@meta.data), full_meta$cell.id)
srat@meta.data$David_CT1 <- full_meta$David_CT1[idx]
srat@meta.data$cell.id <- NULL
colnames(srat@meta.data)[colnames(srat@meta.data) == "David_CT1"] <- "David_cell_type"

keep_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = David_cell_type != "Contaminant")
srat_clean  <- subset(srat, cells = keep_cells)
srat_clean$David_cell_type <- trimws(srat_clean$David_cell_type)

# Top annotation
top_map <- c(
  "PlasmaB" = "PlasmaB",
  "myCAF" = "CAF",
  "Pericyte" = "Pericyte",
  "Macro C1QC" = "Macrophage",
  "Macro TREM2+" = "Macrophage",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8",
  "CD8 effector/memory" = "CD8",
  "CD4 central memory-like" = "CD4",
  "NK-ILC" = "NK-ILC",
  "B" = "B",
  "CD4 naive" = "CD4",
  "Fibro ADAMDEC1" = "Fibroblast",
  "Cycling Myeloid" = "Cycling cell",
  "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "Mast" = "Mast",
  "Entericglial" = "Entericglial",
  "Cycling TNKILC" = "Cycling cell",
  "Fibro KCNN3" = "Fibroblast",
  "Myofibroblast" = "Fibroblast",
  "CD4 T-helper" = "T helper",
  "Epithelial" = "Epithelial",
  "Treg" = "Treg",
  "cDC" = "DC",
  "Venous Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD4 Th17" = "T helper",
  "Macro LYVE1+" = "Macrophage",
  "Fibro BMP-producing" = "Fibroblast",
  "CXCL14+ CAF" = "CAF",
  "CD4 Tfh-like" = "T helper",
  "Monocyte" = "Monocyte",
  "MAIT" = "MAIT",
  "Neutrophil" = "Neutrophil",
  "Macro SPP1+" = "Macrophage",
  "CD8 effector/exhausted" = "CD8",
  "pDC" = "DC",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "Smooth Muscle",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "Fibro stem cell niche" = "Fibroblast"
)

# Crear nueva columna usando el mapeo
srat_clean@meta.data$David_top_CT <- top_map[srat_clean@meta.data$David_cell_type]

# Mid annotation
mid_map <- c(
  "PlasmaB" = "PlasmaB",
  "myCAF" = "myCAF",
  "Pericyte" = "Pericyte",
  "Macro C1QC" = "Macrophage C1QC_TREM2",
  "Macro TREM2+" = "Macrophage C1QC_TREM2",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 resident memory-gd T cell",
  "CD8 effector/memory" = "CD8 effector-memory",
  "CD4 central memory-like" = "CD4 central memory-like",
  "NK-ILC" = "NK-ILC",
  "B" = "B",
  "CD4 naive" = "CD4 naive",
  "Fibro ADAMDEC1" = "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1",
  "Cycling Myeloid" = "Cycling Myeloid",
  "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 rm - gd T cell",
  "Mast" = "Mast",
  "Entericglial" = "Entericglial",
  "Cycling TNKILC" = "Cycling TNKILC",
  "Fibro KCNN3" = "Fibroblast KCNN3",
  "Myofibroblast" = "Myofibroblast",
  "CD4 T-helper" = "CD4 T-helper",
  "Epithelial" = "Epithelial",
  "Treg" = "Treg",
  "cDC" = "cDC",
  "Venous Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD4 Th17" = "CD4 Th17",
  "Macro LYVE1+" = "Macrophage LYVE1",
  "Fibro BMP-producing" = "Fibroblast BMP-producing",
  "CXCL14+ CAF" = "CAF CXCL14+",
  "CD4 Tfh-like" = "CD4 Tfh-like",
  "Monocyte" = "Monocyte",
  "MAIT" = "MAIT",
  "Neutrophil" = "Neutrophil",
  "Macro SPP1+" = "Macrophage SPP1",
  "CD8 effector/exhausted" = "CD8 effector-exhausted",
  "pDC" = "pDC",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "Smooth Muscle",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "Fibro stem cell niche" = "Fibroblast stem cell niche"
)

# Crear nueva columna usando el mapeo
srat_clean@meta.data$David_mid_CT <- mid_map[srat_clean@meta.data$David_cell_type]

# Mid annotation
bot_map <- c(
  "PlasmaB" = "PlasmaB",
  "myCAF" = "myCAF",
  "Pericyte" = "Pericyte",
  "Macro C1QC" = "Macro C1QC",
  "Macro TREM2+" = "Macrophage TREM2",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 resident memory-gd T cell",
  "CD8 effector/memory" = "CD8 effector-memory",
  "CD4 central memory-like" = "CD4 central memory-like",
  "NK-ILC" = "NK-ILC",
  "B" = "B",
  "CD4 naive" = "CD4 naive",
  "Fibro ADAMDEC1" = "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1",
  "Cycling Myeloid" = "Cycling Myeloid",
  "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Arterial-Capillary Endothelial cell",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 rm - gd T cell",
  "Mast" = "Mast",
  "Entericglial" = "Entericglial",
  "Cycling TNKILC" = "Cycling TNKILC",
  "Fibro KCNN3" = "Fibroblast KCNN3",
  "Myofibroblast" = "Myofibroblast",
  "CD4 T-helper" = "CD4 T-helper",
  "Epithelial" = "Epithelial",
  "Treg" = "Treg",
  "cDC" = "cDC",
  "Venous Endothelial cell" = "Venous Endothelial cell",
  "CD4 Th17" = "CD4 Th17",
  "Macro LYVE1+" = "Macrophage LYVE1",
  "Fibro BMP-producing" = "Fibroblast BMP-producing",
  "CXCL14+ CAF" = "CAF CXCL14",
  "CD4 Tfh-like" = "CD4 Tfh-like",
  "Monocyte" = "Monocyte",
  "MAIT" = "MAIT",
  "Neutrophil" = "Neutrophil",
  "Macro SPP1+" = "Macrophage SPP1",
  "CD8 effector/exhausted" = "CD8 effector-exhausted",
  "pDC" = "pDC",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "Smooth Muscle",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Lymphatic Endothelial cell",
  "Fibro stem cell niche" = "Fibroblast stem cell niche"
)

# Crear nueva columna usando el mapeo
srat_clean@meta.data$David_specific_CT <- bot_map[srat_clean@meta.data$David_cell_type]

#New column classification
srat_clean$status <- case_when(
  srat_clean$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_clean$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_clean$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_clean$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_clean$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_clean$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_clean$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)

##############################
mct_map <- c(
  "PlasmaB" = "PlasmaB",
  "myCAF" = "Fibroblast",
  "Pericyte" = "Fibroblast",
  "Macro C1QC" = "Myeloid",
  "Macro TREM2+" = "Myeloid",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "TNKILC",
  "CD8 effector/memory" = "TNKILC",
  "CD4 central memory-like" = "TNKILC",
  "NK-ILC" = "TNKILC",
  "B" = "B",
  "CD4 naive" = "TNKILC",
  "Fibro ADAMDEC1" = "Fibroblast",
  "Cycling Myeloid" = "Myeloid",
  "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "TNKILC",
  "Mast" = "Mast",
  "Entericglial" = "Entericglial",
  "Cycling TNKILC" = "TNKILC",
  "Fibro KCNN3" = "Fibroblast",
  "Myofibroblast" = "Fibroblast",
  "CD4 T-helper" = "TNKILC",
  "Epithelial" = "Epithelial",
  "Treg" = "TNKILC",
  "cDC" = "Myeloid",
  "Venous Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD4 Th17" = "TNKILC",
  "Macro LYVE1+" = "Myeloid",
  "Fibro BMP-producing" = "Fibroblast",
  "CXCL14+ CAF" = "Fibroblast",
  "CD4 Tfh-like" = "TNKILC",
  "Monocyte" = "Myeloid",
  "MAIT" = "TNKILC",
  "Neutrophil" = "Neutrophil",
  "Macro SPP1+" = "Myeloid",
  "CD8 effector/exhausted" = "TNKILC",
  "pDC" = "pDC",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "Fibroblast",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "Fibro stem cell niche" = "Fibroblast"
)

# New column using mapping
srat_clean@meta.data$David_MCT <- mct_map[srat_clean@meta.data$David_cell_type]
#####################

# Save Final Object
saveRDS(srat_clean, "joanito_full_object_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")
```

```{r Plots}
## UMAP
cols1 = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_clean$David_specific_CT)))

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_specific_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE,  cols = cols1) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_detailed_annotated_251127.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 15, height = 12, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_specific_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, cols = cols1) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_detailed_annotated_251127_raster.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 15, height = 12, dpi = 300)

cols2 = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_clean$David_mid_CT)))

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_top_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE,  cols = cols2) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_top_annotated_251127.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_top_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, cols = cols2) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_top_annotated_251127_raster.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_mid_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE,  cols = cols2) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_middle_annotated_251127.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "David_mid_CT", label = TRUE, repel = TRUE, raster = FALSE, cols = cols2) + guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("full_object_middle_annotated_251127_raster.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "Bo_sample_origin", label = FALSE, raster = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("joanito_sample_origin.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "dataset", label = FALSE, raster = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("joanito_dataset.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "Bo_patient_msi", label = FALSE, raster = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("joanito_msi_status.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)

umap_clusters <- DimPlot(srat_clean,  group.by = "status", label = FALSE, raster = FALSE, cols = my_colors2)
ggsave("joanito_final_status.png", plot = umap_clusters, width = 8, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```

# Check patient number per MSI Status

```{r}
srat_meta <- srat_clean@meta.data

table_detailed_annotation <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_specific_CT, status) |>
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(pass_15 = n_cells > 15) |>
  group_by(David_specific_CT, status) |>
  summarise(n_patients = sum(pass_15), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))
print(table_detailed_annotation)

table_middle_annotation <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_mid_CT, status) |>
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(pass_15 = n_cells > 15) |>
  group_by(David_mid_CT, status) |>
  summarise(n_patients = sum(pass_15), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))
print(table_middle_annotation)

table_top_annotation <- srat_meta |> 
  group_by(patient.ID, David_top_CT, status) |> 
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") |> 
  filter(n_cells > 15) |> 
  group_by(David_top_CT, status) |> 
  summarise(n_patients = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))
print(table_top_annotation)
```

```{r % Plots per MSI-iCMS Status (All cell types)}
df_pct <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(status, David_specific_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_MCT <- ggplot(df_pct, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_specific_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols1) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Types"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
ggsave("percent_MSI-iCMS_status.png", plot = pct_MCT, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

########

df_pct <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(status, David_top_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_top_CT <- ggplot(df_pct, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_top_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols2) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Top Cell Types"
  ) +
  theme_bw() + guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("percent_MSI-iCMS_top_CT.png", plot = pct_top_CT, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)

########

df_pct <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(status, David_MCT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_top_CT <- ggplot(df_pct, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_MCT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Mayor Cell Types"
  ) +
  theme_bw() + guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
ggsave("percent_MSI-iCMS_MCT.png", plot = pct_top_CT, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r % Plots per MSI-iCSM Status (TKNILC, Myeloid, Stromal)}
# TNKILC
srat_meta_tnkilc <- srat_meta |>
  filter(David_MCT == "TNKILC")

df_pct_tnkilc <- srat_meta_tnkilc |>
  group_by(status, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

cols3 = distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat_meta_tnkilc$David_mid_CT)))

pct_tnkilc_mid <- ggplot(df_pct_tnkilc, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_mid_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
pct_tnkilc_mid
ggsave("percent_TNKILC_MSI_status_mid_annotation.png", plot = pct_tnkilc_mid, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Myeloid
srat_meta_myeloid <- srat_meta |>
  filter(David_MCT %in% c("Myeloid", "Neutrophil", "pDC"))

df_pct_myeloid <- srat_meta_myeloid |>
  group_by(status, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_myeloid_mid <- ggplot(df_pct_myeloid, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_mid_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
pct_myeloid_mid
ggsave("percent_myeloid_MSI_status_mid_annotation.png", plot = pct_myeloid_mid, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)

# Fibroblasts
srat_meta_fibroblast <- srat_meta |>
  filter(David_MCT == "Fibroblast")

df_pct_fibroblast <- srat_meta_fibroblast |>
  group_by(status, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_fibroblast_mid <- ggplot(df_pct_fibroblast, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_mid_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
pct_fibroblast_mid
ggsave("percent_fibroblast_MSI_status_mid_annotation.png", plot = pct_fibroblast_mid, width = 7, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r Boxplot per MSI-iCMS Status (TKNILC, Myeloid, Stromal)}
# Count cells per patient × cluster
df_counts <- srat_meta_tnkilc |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Total cells per patient
df_totals <- srat_meta_tnkilc |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")

# Combine + compute percentages
df_pct <- df_counts |>
  left_join(df_totals, by = "patient.ID") |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / total)

patient_condition <- srat_meta_tnkilc |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(condition = unique(status), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_pct |>
  left_join(patient_condition, by = "patient.ID")

df_msi <- df_pct |> 
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

get_pw <- function(pw_mat, g1, g2) {
  if (is.null(pw_mat)) return(NA_real_)
  
  # Matrix
  if (is.matrix(pw_mat)) {
    if (g1 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g2 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g1, g2])
    }
    if (g2 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g1 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g2, g1])
    }
  }
  
  # Named vector (only two conditions existed)
  if (is.numeric(pw_mat) && !is.null(names(pw_mat))) {
    nm <- names(pw_mat)
    pair1 <- paste0(g1, "-", g2)
    pair2 <- paste0(g2, "-", g1)
    if (pair1 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair1])
    if (pair2 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair2])
  }
  
  return(NA_real_)
}

# Main KW + pairwise function
kw_results <- df_msi |>
  group_by(David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(
    # Keep data for this CT
    data_ct = list(cur_data()),
    
    # Kruskal-Wallis global p-value
    p_kw = kruskal.test(pct ~ condition, data = cur_data())$p.value,
    
    # Pairwise Wilcoxon tests (may return matrix or named vector)
    pw = list(
      pairwise.wilcox.test(
        x = cur_data()$pct,
        g = cur_data()$condition,
        exact = FALSE,
        p.adjust.method = "BH"
      )$p.value
    ),
    
    # Medians
    median_MSIH  = median(pct[condition == "MSI-H"]),
    median_MSSi2 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i2"]),
    median_MSSi3 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i3"]),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  # Extract pairwise p-values
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
    p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3 = get_pw(pw, "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    FDR_KW = p.adjust(p_kw, method = "BH")
  ) |>
  select(
    David_mid_CT,
    p_kw, FDR_KW,
    median_MSIH, median_MSSi2, median_MSSi3,
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2, p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3, p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3
  )

my_comparisons <- list(
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
  c("MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
)

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "David_mid_CT",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  # Global KW
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format"
  ) +
  # Pairwise Wilcoxon (unpaired)
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") + xlab("") +
  ggtitle("TNKILC cell proportions")

ggsave("TNKILC_cell_proportion.png", boxplot, height = 14, width = 15)

####################################

df_counts <- srat_meta_myeloid |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_totals <- srat_meta_myeloid |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_counts |>
  left_join(df_totals, by = "patient.ID") |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / total)

patient_condition <- srat_meta_myeloid |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(condition = unique(status), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_pct |>
  left_join(patient_condition, by = "patient.ID")

df_msi <- df_pct |> 
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "David_mid_CT",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format"
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") + xlab("") +
  ggtitle("Myeloid cell proportions")

ggsave("Myeloid_cell_proportion.png", boxplot, height = 12, width = 13)

####################################
df_counts <- srat_meta_fibroblast |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_totals <- srat_meta_fibroblast |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_counts |>
  left_join(df_totals, by = "patient.ID") |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / total)

patient_condition <- srat_meta_fibroblast |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(condition = unique(status), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_pct |>
  left_join(patient_condition, by = "patient.ID")

df_msi <- df_pct |> 
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "David_mid_CT",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format"
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") + xlab("") +
  ggtitle("Myeloid cell proportions")

ggsave("Stromal_cell_proportion.png", boxplot, height = 13, width = 13)
```

# Subset Object at least n=3 w/ 15 cells per MSI Status

```{r}
keep_cells <- WhichCells(srat_clean, expression = !(David_mid_CT %in% c("CAF CXCL14+", "CD4 T-helper", "Cycling Myeloid", "Entericglial", "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1", "Fibroblast BMP-producing", "Fibroblast KCNN3", "Neutrophil", "Myofibroblast", "Smooth Muscle", "pDC")))
srat_min15  <- subset(srat_clean, cells = keep_cells)

# Save Final Object
saveRDS(srat_min15, "joanito_full_object_251127_David_annotated_min15cells_in_3patients.rds")
```

```{r}
srat_meta_stromal <- srat_meta |>
  filter(David_MCT == "Fibroblast")

table(srat_meta_fibroblast$David_MCT, srat_meta_fibroblast$MCT)
table(srat_meta_myeloid$David_MCT, srat_meta_myeloid$MCT)
table(srat_meta_tnkilc$David_MCT, srat_meta_tnkilc$MCT)

table(srat_meta$David_MCT, srat_meta$MCT)

srat <- readRDS("joanito_full_object_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")
srat_meta <- srat@meta.data
srat_meta <- srat_meta |>
  mutate(
    corrected = case_when(
      David_MCT == "B"      & MCT == "B"      ~ "B",
      David_MCT == "TNKILC" & MCT == "T"      ~ "TNKILC",
      David_MCT == "TNKILC"      & MCT == "NK"      ~ "TNKILC",
      David_MCT == "Endothelial"     & MCT == "Endothelial"     ~ "Endothelial",
      David_MCT == "Entericglial"      & MCT == "Entericglial"      ~ "Entericglial",
      David_MCT == "Epithelial"      & MCT == "Epithelial"      ~ "Epithelial",
      David_MCT == "Fibroblast"     & MCT == "Fibroblast"     ~ "Fibroblast",
      David_MCT == "Mast"      & MCT == "Mast"      ~ "Mast",
      David_MCT == "Myeloid"      & MCT == "McDC"      ~ "Myeloid",
      David_MCT == "Neutrophil"      & MCT == "Neutrophils"      ~ "Neutrophil",
      David_MCT == "pDC"     & MCT == "pDC"     ~ "pDC",
      David_MCT == "PlasmaB"      & MCT == "PlasmaB"      ~ "PlasmaB",
      TRUE ~ "contaminant"
    )
  )

srat_meta_filt <- srat_meta |>
  filter(corrected != "contaminant")

keep_cells <- WhichCells(srat_meta, expression = !(David_MCT == "contaminant"))
srat_filt  <- subset(srat_clean, cells = keep_cells)
```

```{r}
# Keep only those cells in the Seurat object
srat_filtered <- subset(srat, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_filtered, "full_object_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")

srat_epithelial <- readRDS("joanito_epithelial_251119.rds")
srat_epi_filtered <- subset(srat_epithelial, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_epi_filtered, "epithelial_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")

srat_myeloid <- readRDS("joanito_myeloid_251121_David_annotated_correct.rds")
srat_myeloid_filtered <- subset(srat_myeloid, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_myeloid_filtered, "myeloid_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")

srat_tnk <- readRDS("joanito_tnk_251125_David_annotated.rds")
srat_tnk_filtered <- subset(srat_tnk, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_tnk_filtered, "tnk_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")

srat_stromal <- readRDS("joanito_stromal_251120_David_annotated.rds")
srat_stromal_filtered <- subset(srat_stromal, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_myeloid_filtered, "stromal_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")

srat_other <- readRDS("joanito_rest_cells_251120.rds")
srat_other_filtered <- subset(srat_other, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_other_filtered, "other_cells_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")

keep_cells <- WhichCells(srat_filtered, expression = !(David_mid_CT %in% c("CAF CXCL14+", "CD4 T-helper", "Cycling Myeloid", "Entericglial", "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1", "Fibroblast BMP-producing", "Fibroblast KCNN3", "Neutrophil", "Myofibroblast", "Smooth Muscle", "pDC")))
srat_min15<- subset(srat_filtered, cells = keep_cells)

keep_cells <- WhichCells(srat_min15, expression = status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))
srat_min15  <- subset(srat_min15, cells = keep_cells)

srat_min15@meta.data <- srat_min15@meta.data |>
  dplyr::rename(
    David_old_annotation = David_cell_type,
    David_cell_type = David_mid_CT,
    PID = patient.ID
  )

# Save Final Object
saveRDS(srat_min15, "full_object_251127_David_annotated_corrected_min15cells_3patients_msi_icms.rds")
```

```{r Also filter patient+celltype+status w/ <15 cells}
srat_meta <- srat_min15@meta.data
srat_meta$combo_label <- paste0(srat_meta$David_cell_type, "_", srat_meta$status, "_", srat_meta$PID)
srat_min15$combo_label <- paste0(srat_min15$David_cell_type, "_", srat_min15$status, "_", srat$PID)

table_middle_annotation <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(combo_label) |>
  summarise(n_cells = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(pass_15 = n_cells > 15)
print(table_middle_annotation)

valid_combos <- table_middle_annotation |>
  filter(pass_15) |>
  pull(combo_label) |>
  unique()

srat_filtered <- subset(srat_min15, subset = combo_label %in% valid_combos)

saveRDS(srat_min15, "joanito_full_object_251128_David_annotated_min15cells_in_3patients_post_filter.rds")
```

## Additional

```{r New annotation}
# Mid annotation
mid_map <- c(
  "PlasmaB" = "PlasmaB",
  "myCAF" = "myCAF",
  "Pericyte" = "Pericyte",
  "Macro C1QC" = "Macrophage C1QC_TREM2",
  "Macro TREM2+" = "Macrophage C1QC_TREM2",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 resident memory-gd T cell",
  "CD8 effector/memory" = "CD8 effector-memory",
  "CD4 central memory-like" = "CD4 central memory-like",
  "NK-ILC" = "NK-ILC",
  "B" = "B",
  "CD4 naive" = "CD4 naive",
  "Fibro ADAMDEC1" = "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1",
  "Cycling Myeloid" = "Cycling Myeloid",
  "Arterial_Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD8 resident memory/gd T cell" = "CD8 rm - gd T cell",
  "Mast" = "Mast",
  "Entericglial" = "Entericglial",
  "Cycling TNKILC" = "Cycling TNKILC",
  "Fibro KCNN3" = "Fibroblast KCNN3",
  "Myofibroblast" = "Myofibroblast",
  "CD4 T-helper" = "CD4 T-helper",
  "Epithelial" = "Epithelial",
  "Treg" = "Treg",
  "cDC" = "cDC",
  "Venous Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "CD4 Th17" = "CD4 Th17",
  "Macro LYVE1+" = "Macrophage LYVE1",
  "Fibro BMP-producing" = "Fibroblast BMP-producing",
  "CXCL14+ CAF" = "CAF CXCL14+",
  "CD4 Tfh-like" = "CD4 Tfh-like",
  "Monocyte" = "Monocyte",
  "MAIT" = "MAIT",
  "Neutrophil" = "Neutrophil",
  "Macro SPP1+" = "Macrophage SPP1",
  "CD8 effector/exhausted" = "CD8 effector-exhausted",
  "pDC" = "pDC",
  "Smooth Muscle" = "Smooth Muscle",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Endothelial",
  "Fibro stem cell niche" = "Fibroblast stem cell niche"
)

srat_filt <- readRDS("full_object_251127_David_annotated_corrected.rds")
srat_meta_filt <- srat_filt@meta.data
rm(srat_filt)

# Myeloid
srat_myeloid <- readRDS("joanito_myeloid_251121_David_annotated_correct.rds")
srat_myeloid@meta.data$David_cell_type <- mid_map[srat_myeloid@meta.data$David_CT1]
srat_myeloid$status <- case_when(
  srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_myeloid$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)
srat_myeloid <- subset(srat_myeloid, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_myeloid, "myeloid_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")
rm(srat_myeloid)

# Stromal
srat_stromal <- readRDS("joanito_stromal_251120_David_annotated.rds")
srat_stromal@meta.data$David_cell_type <- mid_map[srat_stromal@meta.data$David_CT1]
srat_stromal$status <- case_when(
  srat_stromal$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_stromal$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_stromal$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_stromal$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_stromal$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_stromal$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_stromal$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)
srat_stromal <- subset(srat_stromal, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_stromal, "stromal_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")
rm(srat_stromal)

# TNK
srat_tnk <- readRDS("joanito_tnk_251125_David_annotated.rds")
srat_tnk@meta.data$David_cell_type <- mid_map[srat_tnk@meta.data$David_CT1]
srat_tnk$status <- case_when(
  srat_tnk$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_tnk$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_tnk$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_tnk$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_tnk$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_tnk$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_tnk$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)
srat_tnk <- subset(srat_tnk, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_tnk, "tnk_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")
rm(srat_tnk)

# Epithelial
srat_epithelial <- readRDS("joanito_epithelial_251119.rds")
srat_epithelial@meta.data$David_cell_type <- "Epithelial"
srat_epithelial$status <- case_when(
  srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_epithelial$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)
srat_epithelial <- subset(srat_epithelial, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_epithelial, "epithelial_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")
rm(srat_epithelial)

# Other
srat_other <- readRDS("joanito_rest_cells_251120.rds")
srat_other@meta.data$David_cell_type <- mid_map[srat_other@meta.data$David_MCT]
srat_other$status <- case_when(
  srat_other$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "Normal" & srat_other$Bo_patient_msi == "Normal" ~ "Normal",
  srat_other$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS3"  & srat_other$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i3",
  srat_other$Bo_patient_iCMS_purity == "iCMS2"  & srat_other$Bo_patient_msi == "MSS"    ~ "MSS-i2",
  srat_other$Bo_patient_msi == "MSI-H"                                                  ~ "MSI-H",
  TRUE ~ "Indeterminate"
)
srat_other <- subset(srat_other, cells = rownames(srat_meta_filt))
saveRDS(srat_other, "other_cells_251127_David_annotated_correct.rds")
rm(srat_other)
```


```{r}
# Fibroblasts
colorsX <- distinctColorPalette(length(unique(srat$David_mid_CT)))
  
srat_meta <- srat@meta.data

srat_meta$merged_id <- paste(srat_meta$patient.ID, srat_meta$David_mid_CT, srat_meta$status, sep = "_")

cell_counts <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(merged_id) |>
  tally(name = "cell_count")

valid_ids <- cell_counts |>
  filter(cell_count >= 15) |>
  pull(merged_id)

srat_meta_filtered <- srat_meta |>
  filter(merged_id %in% valid_ids)

df_pct<- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(status, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_mid <- ggplot(df_pct, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = David_mid_CT)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = colorsX) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
pct_mid


###################################

df_counts <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID, David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_totals <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_counts |>
  left_join(df_totals, by = "patient.ID") |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / total)

patient_condition <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(condition = unique(status), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_pct |>
  left_join(patient_condition, by = "patient.ID")

df_msi <- df_pct |> 
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

get_pw <- function(pw_mat, g1, g2) {
  if (is.null(pw_mat)) return(NA_real_)
  
  if (is.matrix(pw_mat)) {
    if (g1 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g2 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g1, g2])
    }
    if (g2 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g1 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g2, g1])
    }
  }
  
  if (is.numeric(pw_mat) && !is.null(names(pw_mat))) {
    nm <- names(pw_mat)
    pair1 <- paste0(g1, "-", g2)
    pair2 <- paste0(g2, "-", g1)
    if (pair1 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair1])
    if (pair2 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair2])
  }
  
  return(NA_real_)
}

kw_results <- df_msi |>
  group_by(David_mid_CT) |>
  summarise(
    data_ct = list(cur_data()),
    p_kw = kruskal.test(pct ~ condition, data = cur_data())$p.value,

    pw = list(
      pairwise.wilcox.test(
        x = cur_data()$pct,
        g = cur_data()$condition,
        exact = FALSE,
        p.adjust.method = "BH"
      )$p.value
    ),

    median_MSIH  = median(pct[condition == "MSI-H"]),
    median_MSSi2 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i2"]),
    median_MSSi3 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i3"]),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
    p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3 = get_pw(pw, "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    FDR_KW = p.adjust(p_kw, method = "BH")
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    David_mid_CT,
    p_kw, FDR_KW,
    median_MSIH, median_MSSi2, median_MSSi3,
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2, p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3, p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3
  )

my_comparisons <- list(
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
  c("MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
)

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "David_mid_CT",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format"
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") + xlab("") +
  ggtitle("TNKILC cell proportions")

ggsave("All_cell_proportion_filtered.png", boxplot, height = 20, width = 18)


#### OPTION 2
n_patients <- df_msi |>
  group_by(David_mid_CT, condition) |>
  summarize(n = n_distinct(patient.ID), 
            y_pos = min(pct) - 2,
            .groups = "drop")

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "David_mid_CT",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format") +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") +
  xlab("") +
  ggtitle("TNKILC cell proportions") +
  geom_text(
    data = n_patients,
    aes(x = condition, y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = 1
  )

ggsave("All_cell_proportion_filtered_v2.png", boxplot, height = 22, width = 18)
```

```{r}
broad_map <- c(

  ## CD4 T cells
  "CD4 naive"                = "CD4",
  "CD4 central memory-like"  = "CD4",
  "CD4 T-helper"             = "CD4",
  "CD4 Th17"                 = "CD4",
  "CD4 Tfh-like"             = "CD4",
  "Treg"                     = "CD4",

  ## CD8 T cells
  "CD8 effector-memory"          = "CD8",
  "CD8 effector-exhausted"       = "CD8",
  "CD8 resident memory-gd T cell"= "CD8",
  "CD8 rm - gd T cell"           = "CD8",

  ## Macrophages / Myeloid
  "Macrophage C1QC"          = "Macrophages",
  "Macrophage TREM2"         = "Macrophages",
  "Macrophage LYVE1"         = "Macrophages",
  "Macrophage SPP1"          = "Macrophages",

  ## Fibroblasts / CAFs
  "myCAF"                    = "Fibroblasts",
  "Fibroblast ADAMDEC1"      = "Fibroblasts",
  "Fibroblast KCNN3"         = "Fibroblasts",
  "Fibroblast BMP-producing" = "Fibroblasts",
  "Fibroblast stem cell niche" = "Fibroblasts",
  "CAF CXCL14"               = "Fibroblasts",
  "Myofibroblast"            = "Fibroblasts",

  ## Epithelial
  "Epithelial"               = "Epithelial",

  ## Everything else
  "Monocyte"                 = "Others",
  "Cycling Myeloid"          = "Others",
  "NK-ILC"                   = "Others",
  "Cycling TNKILC"           = "Others",
  "MAIT"                     = "Others",
  "B"                        = "Others",
  "PlasmaB"                  = "Others",
  "cDC"                      = "Others",
  "pDC"                      = "Others",
  "Neutrophil"               = "Others",
  "Mast"                     = "Others",
  "Smooth Muscle"            = "Others",
  "Pericyte"                 = "Others",
  "Entericglial"             = "Others",
  "Arterial-Capillary Endothelial cell" = "Others",
  "Venous Endothelial cell"  = "Others",
  "Lymphatic Endothelial cell" = "Others"
)

srat@meta.data$Broad_cell_type <-
  broad_map[srat@meta.data$David_specific_CT]

srat@meta.data$Broad_cell_type[is.na(srat@meta.data$Broad_cell_type)] <- "Others"
```

```{r}
srat_meta <- srat@meta.data

srat_meta$merged_id <- paste(srat_meta$patient.ID, srat_meta$Broad_cell_type, srat_meta$status, sep = "_")

cell_counts <- srat_meta |>
  group_by(merged_id) |>
  tally(name = "cell_count")

valid_ids <- cell_counts |>
  filter(cell_count >= 15) |>
  pull(merged_id)

srat_meta_filtered <- srat_meta |>
  filter(merged_id %in% valid_ids)

df_pct<- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(status, Broad_cell_type) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop_last") |>
  mutate(percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) |>
  ungroup() |>
  filter(status %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

pct_mid <- ggplot(df_pct, aes(x = status, y = percent, fill = Broad_cell_type)) +
  geom_col(position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_colors) +
  labs(
    x = "Patient (MSI-iCMS status)",
    y = "Proportion",
    fill = "Cell Type"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
pct_mid

###################################

df_counts <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID, Broad_cell_type) |>
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_totals <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_counts |>
  left_join(df_totals, by = "patient.ID") |>
  mutate(pct = 100 * n / total)

patient_condition <- srat_meta_filtered |>
  group_by(patient.ID) |>
  summarise(condition = unique(status), .groups = "drop")

df_pct <- df_pct |>
  left_join(patient_condition, by = "patient.ID")

df_msi <- df_pct |> 
  dplyr::filter(condition %in% c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3"))

get_pw <- function(pw_mat, g1, g2) {
  if (is.null(pw_mat)) return(NA_real_)
  
  if (is.matrix(pw_mat)) {
    if (g1 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g2 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g1, g2])
    }
    if (g2 %in% rownames(pw_mat) && g1 %in% colnames(pw_mat)) {
      return(pw_mat[g2, g1])
    }
  }
  
  if (is.numeric(pw_mat) && !is.null(names(pw_mat))) {
    nm <- names(pw_mat)
    pair1 <- paste0(g1, "-", g2)
    pair2 <- paste0(g2, "-", g1)
    if (pair1 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair1])
    if (pair2 %in% nm) return(pw_mat[pair2])
  }
  
  return(NA_real_)
}

kw_results <- df_msi |>
  group_by(Broad_cell_type) |>
  summarise(
    data_ct = list(cur_data()),
    
    p_kw = kruskal.test(pct ~ condition, data = cur_data())$p.value,
    
    pw = list(
      pairwise.wilcox.test(
        x = cur_data()$pct,
        g = cur_data()$condition,
        exact = FALSE,
        p.adjust.method = "BH"
      )$p.value
    ),
    
    median_MSIH  = median(pct[condition == "MSI-H"]),
    median_MSSi2 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i2"]),
    median_MSSi3 = median(pct[condition == "MSS-i3"]),
    
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3  = get_pw(pw, "MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
    p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3 = get_pw(pw, "MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    FDR_KW = p.adjust(p_kw, method = "BH")
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(
    Broad_cell_type,
    p_kw, FDR_KW,
    median_MSIH, median_MSSi2, median_MSSi3,
    p_MSIH_vs_MSSi2, p_MSIH_vs_MSSi3, p_MSSi2_vs_MSSi3
  )

my_comparisons <- list(
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i2"),
  c("MSI-H", "MSS-i3"),
  c("MSS-i2", "MSS-i3")
)

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "Broad_cell_type",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format"
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") + xlab("") +
  ggtitle("TNKILC cell proportions")

ggsave("Macro_cell_proportion_filtered.png", boxplot, height = 10, width = 15)


#### OPTION 2
n_patients <- df_msi |>
  group_by(Broad_cell_type, condition) |>
  summarize(n = n_distinct(patient.ID), 
            y_pos = min(pct) - 2,
            .groups = "drop")

boxplot <- ggboxplot(
  df_msi,
  x = "condition",
  y = "pct",
  fill = "condition",
  facet.by = "Broad_cell_type",
  scales = "free_y"
) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("MSI-H"  = "#1E938B", "MSS-i2" = "#FFA844", "MSS-i3" = "#E96767")
  ) +
  stat_compare_means(method = "kruskal.test", label.y = Inf, label = "p.format") +
  stat_compare_means(
    method = "wilcox.test", paired = FALSE, comparisons = my_comparisons,
    p.adjust.method = "BH", label = "p.format"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
  ylab("% of cells (per patient)") +
  xlab("") +
  ggtitle("TNKILC cell proportions") +
  geom_text(
    data = n_patients,
    aes(x = condition, y = y_pos, label = paste0("n=", n)),
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    vjust = 1
  )

ggsave("Macro_cell_proportion_filtered_v2.png", boxplot, height = 11, width = 15)
```

```{r}
tnk_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = Broad_cell_type != "Others")
srat_filt  <- subset(srat, cells = tnk_cells)

tnk_cells <- WhichCells(srat, expression = status %in% c("MSS-i2", "MSS-i3", "MSI-H"))
srat_filt  <- subset(srat, cells = tnk_cells)
```
